privileged_info_summary: This is a Docker hot-reload task for the Inventory API service. The service is located at /home/ga/projects/inventory-service and is named 'inventory-api' in docker-compose.yml. The Flask application is configured to run on port 5000, and the admin user 'ga' owns and executes the task. All data is synthetic and generated by the setup script during task initialization. The task requires an agent to create a docker-compose.override.yml file to enable hot-reloading by mounting the local ./app directory, exposing port 5000, setting FLASK_DEBUG=1, and configuring the flask development server.
